Section Title: ... > ### About Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth
Content:
Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Mahindra Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 04 Feb 2016. Krishna Sanghavi is the Current Fund Manager of Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,742 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Apr 2026 is ₹10.62.
The Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Exit Load for units in excess of 10% of the investment,1% will be charged for redemption within 12 months
;
Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Asia Pacific REITs FoF Direct Growth > ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme seeks to provide long term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in units of Manulife Global Fund Asia Pacific REIT Fund, an overseas fund primarily investing in real estate investment trusts (REITs) in the Asia Pacific ex-Japan region.
Fund benchmark FTSE EPRA Nareli Asia Ex Japan REITs Index
[Scheme Information Document(SID)](https://www.mahindramanulife.com)

results.title: Mahindra Manulife Overnight Fund - Regular Plan: Overview, Performance, Portfolio | Mutual Fund
excerpts:
Section Title: Mahindra Manulife Overnight Fund - Regular Plan > ... > Min. No of Cheques
Content:
**If investment is made on or after 1 April 2023:** Entire amount of gain is added to the investors' income and taxed according to the applicable slab rate.
**If investment is made before 1 April 2023:
**
Sold within 2 years from the date of investment: Gains are added to the investors' income and taxed according to the applicable slab rate.
Sold after 2 years from the date of investment: Gains are taxed at the rate of 12.5%.
No tax is to be paid as long as you continue to hold the units.
 ... 
Section Title: ... > What is the minimum investment required in Mahindra Manulife Overnight Fund - Regular Plan?
Content:
The minimum investment required to start investing in Mahindra Manulife Overnight Fund - Regular Plan is ₹1,000 for the lump sum option and ₹500 for the SIP (Systematic Investment Plan) option.
